heading: Prison Industries report to Congress
label: 4127 Prison Industries report to Congress
text: The board of directors of Federal Prison Industries shall submit an annual report to the Congress on the conduct of the business of the corporation during each fiscal year, and on the condition of its funds during such fiscal year. Such report shall include a statement of the amount of obligations issued under section 4129(a)(1) during such fiscal year, and an estimate of the amount of obligations that will be so issued in the following fiscal year.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 18, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 744m (, ).June 23, 1934, ch. 736, § 548 Stat. 1212Words “of Federal Prison Industries” were inserted after “board of directors”.Minor changes were made in phraseology.

Amendments1988— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “The board of directors of Federal Prison Industries shall make annual reports to Congress on the conduct of the business of the corporation and on the condition of its funds.”Pub. L. 100–690

Termination of Reporting RequirementsFor termination, effective , of reporting provisions in this section, see , as amended, set out as a note under , Money and Finance, and page 117 of House Document No. 103–7.May 15, 2000section 3003 of Pub. L. 104–66section 1113 of Title 31
